'''House Barnaba''' was a [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]] that ruled the [[Barnaba Province]], which was in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Barnaba was the most hedonistic of the noble houses and focused more on establishing fashion trends, discovering new vacation spots, fads, causes and so on, than on sector [[Politics/Legends|politics]].

==History==
For many [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]], Barnaba remained outside of the machinations of the other houses, content to only dabble in intrigue and instead enjoy its posh lifestyle. Easy access to [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] allowed the house to tap into the lucrative trade going through the [[Shapani Bypass]] and gave it more than enough [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|credits]] to support the extravagant lifestyle of its [[Noble/Legends|nobles]].

About a hundred years before the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[House Mecetti]] used the [[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]] to pass laws targeting Barnaba's trade with the [[Freeworlds Territory|Freeworlds]]. Its economy threatened, Barnaba moved quickly to seal a treaty with [[House Melantha]], which was one of Mecetti's chief rivals. This alliance took some pressure off, but nonstop skirmishes with House Mecetti continued. House Barnaba allied itself with the [[Jalk Syndicate]], which had previously been allied with House Mecetti, and in return for allowing the syndicate to operate freely in Barnaba space (with the exception of [[Vycinyth]]) the syndicate supplied Barnaba with enough credits to delay the attempted Mecetti takeover until Mecetti backed off. The alliance with [[Boss Tosk]] was unknown to most of House Barnaba, even [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Varin Arabella]], who would likely have put a stop to it had she found out.

==Assets==
The sector's premier vacation spot, the resort world of [[Vycinyth]], was in Barnaba space. All the profits generated from the resort world went straight to the house's coffers. House Barnaba also had a secret source of credits in the form of its alliance with Boss Tosk's Jalk Syndicate.

===[[House Defense Forces]] (0 BBY to 3.5 ABY)===
House Barnaba maintained a small [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of five [[Tapani-class assault frigate|''Tapani''-class assault frigates]], along with a host of [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]] to keep the safety in the [[Vycinyth system/Legends|Vycinyth system]]. House Barnaba also had three luxury cruisers with concealed weapons that could be pressed into service, along with a contract with a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] band of some 400 [[Gamorrean]]s called [[Grrtok's Band]].
